MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-22-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Lisl R. Duncan, Esq., appearing for Plaintiffs Ruben Barrera, Salvador Cortes, Mario Gonzales, and Jose De Jesus Maldonado. Plaintiff Ruben Barrera not present in court.
Court Ordered Defendants Does 1-20 dismissed without prejudice.
Plaintiffs sworn and examined on their own behalf through Spanish Interpreter Carol Glasser.

No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Empire Contracting Roof Service, Empire Contracting Roof Service, Inc, and Gustavo Melendez.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiffs Ruben Barrera $7,313.50; Salvador Cortes $86,511.89; Mario Gonzalez $86,511.89; Jose de Jesus Maldonado $86,511.89.

Principal $207,687.98
Pre-Judgment Interest $59,161.21
Attorney's Fees and Costs $65,470.44

Total Judgment in the amount of $332,319.63
Judgment signed in open court.
